title: Professor Katsumi Matsumoto named Fulbright U.S. Scholar
summary_en: University of Minnesota Twin Cities College of Science and Engineering Professor Katsumi Matsumoto has been named a Fulbright U.S. Scholar and will spend part of the 2026-27 academic year in Germany advancing research on the global ocean carbon cycle.
title_cn: 明尼苏达大学双城分校松本克己教授获评富布莱特美国学者
summary_cn: 2026年5月8日，美国明尼苏达大学双城分校科学与工程学院教授松本克己（Katsumi Matsumoto）被正式评为富布莱特美国学者。作为该项殊荣的一部分，松本教授将在2026至2027学年期间前往德国，专注于全球海洋碳循环领域的深化研究。富布莱特学者项目系美国政府资助的旗舰级国际学术交流项目，旨在资助美国高等教育机构的教学科研人员及专业人士赴海外从事教学与前沿科学研究工作。

title: Student commencement speaker embraces community
summary_en: On May 14, Wisconsin-native Lila Branchaw, will speak on behalf of the University of Minnesota College of Science and Engineering (CSE) graduating Class of 2026 and remind her classmates that failure is not something to fear, but something to expect and embrace.
